tasks.name: 鸭子 - 刺客
tasks.prompt: American retro superhero comic book style, 1:1 square avatar, extreme close-up portrait, head and shoulders only. A gray duck assassin wearing a black ninja mask covering lower beak, only sharp vengeful eyes visible, right claw holding a gleaming dagger across chest. Bold black ink outlines, pop-art halftone dot shading, high contrast dramatic lighting. Background: deep crimson and black dual-color radial burst lines. Retro saturated colors, cel-shaded flat coloring.

tasks.name: 鸭子 - 专杀
tasks.prompt: American retro comic book style, 1:1 square avatar framing, extreme close-up head and shoulders. A blue-gray duck with manic grin and dilated pupils, feathers ruffled aggressively, right claw holding a bloodstained kitchen knife aloft. Thick black ink outlines, jagged hatching shadow lines, pop-art halftone dots. Strong backlighting, orange and deep blue high contrast. Background: orange-blue dual-color radial speed lines.

tasks.name: 鹅 - 侦探
tasks.prompt: American retro detective comic style, 1:1 square avatar extreme close-up. A white goose wearing a classic deerstalker hat and plaid scarf, a monocle magnifying glass clipped over one eye, sharp investigative gaze, analyzing intently. Thick comic ink outlines, fine hatching shadows for mystery mood. Warm brown side lighting. Background: brown and beige dual-color radial lines with investigation board grid overlay.
